Headquarters City – Franchise Available in Vizianagaram

Pharma Franchise in Vizianagaram, Andhra Pradesh

Join a PCD pharma franchise in the city where Crasenim Pharma was born. As our headquarters, Vizianagaram offers franchise partners unmatched advantages: the strongest local brand recognition, direct management access, fastest product dispatch, and first choice of territory — including high-potential sub-markets in Bobbili, Parvathipuram, and Salur.

📍 Vizianagaram – Company HQ 🏢 Exclusive Territory Rights ✅ WHO GMP Certified Products ⚡ Fastest Franchise Support in AP
💬 Enquire via WhatsApp All Franchise Info
HQ City Advantage

Why a Vizianagaram Franchise is Different from Any Other City

Being our headquarters gives Vizianagaram franchise partners advantages that no other territory in AP can offer.

Crasenim Pharma is headquartered in Vizianagaram, which means the local medical community here knows us best. Doctors, pharmacists, and chemists in the city have encountered our products and promotional materials long before any other market in AP. That pre-existing awareness directly shortens your sales cycle as a new franchise partner.

As a Vizianagaram franchisee, you also benefit from the shortest supply chain — products can be dispatched or picked up same-day in most cases, reducing the stockout risk that affects partners in distant cities. Management and training visits happen more frequently here because our team is local.

Vizianagaram Territory Zones Available

Vizianagaram City (Hospital Road, Main Market, Mandal areas), Bobbili, Parvathipuram, Salur, Gajapathinagaram, Chipurupalle, Rajam mandal zone

Two Franchise Models in Vizianagaram

PCD Franchise: Take an exclusive zone within Vizianagaram district — you own the territory and distribute our products under your business.

Commission-Based MR: Promote our brands to Vizianagaram doctors and earn per prescription generated — zero investment required.

  • Highest brand awareness among local doctors — faster acceptance
  • Same-day or next-day product dispatch from HQ
  • Direct access to founding management for franchise queries
  • First priority on new product launches in your territory
  • Sub-territories in Bobbili, Parvathipuram and Salur available
District Opportunity

Vizianagaram District Sub-Markets: Bobbili, Parvathipuram & Salur

The Vizianagaram district offers three high-potential sub-markets that franchise partners can cover alongside or independently of the city territory.

Sub-Territory

Bobbili

One of Vizianagaram district's most active secondary markets. Good GP and general hospital density. Strong pharmacy channel with consistent OTC movement. Ideal for franchisees looking to expand beyond city limits.

Sub-Territory

Parvathipuram

Tribal area headquarters with a growing government and private health infrastructure. Lower competition from established pharma franchises — an early-mover advantage for our franchise partners entering this sub-market.

Sub-Territory

Salur

Mid-sized mandal town on the NH-16 corridor with a developing private clinic ecosystem. Reliable prescription movement for antibiotics and gastric products. Good connectivity for regular field visits from Vizianagaram city.

Products

Products Available for Vizianagaram Franchise Partners

Antibiotic

Amoxsenim-CV 625

Amoxycillin 500mg + Clavulanic Acid 125mg. High-demand product across GPs and ENT specialists in Vizianagaram.

Anti-Hypertensive

Telsenim-40

Telmisartan 40mg with Smartdose™ technology. Growing cardiac prescription movement in Vizianagaram district hospitals.

Diabetic

Metsenim-G1/G2

Metformin PR + Glimepiride. Consistent diabetologist and physician prescriptions across the district.

Gastric

Pansenim-DSR

Pantoprazole 40mg + Domperidone 30mg SR. One of the fastest-moving products in the Vizianagaram market.

Pediatric

Crasenim Bar

Syndet Bar pH 5.5. Strong paediatrician recommendation and counter movement at Vizianagaram city pharmacies.

Wellness

Crasenim-LC

Mecobalamin + Folic Acid + L-Carnitine. Good neurology and general medicine prescriptions across the district.

FAQs

Pharma Franchise in Vizianagaram – FAQ

Why should I take a franchise in Vizianagaram specifically?
Vizianagaram is Crasenim Pharma's headquarters city. Franchise partners here benefit from the highest local brand recognition, fastest product supply, direct management contact, and most responsive field support of any territory in AP. The established brand presence significantly shortens the time to your first prescriptions.
Are sub-territories like Bobbili, Parvathipuram and Salur available separately?
Yes. Sub-territory franchises in Bobbili, Parvathipuram, Salur, Gajapathinagaram and other Vizianagaram district mandals are available independently. You can take a city-only franchise or a combined city + district territory depending on your capacity and field team size.
What is the investment required for a franchise in Vizianagaram?
Investment starts from an initial stock purchase, which varies based on the zone size and product mix selected. Because we are headquartered here, minimum order logistics are more flexible for Vizianagaram partners. Contact us via WhatsApp for current figures.
Can I take a commission-based MR role in Vizianagaram without buying franchise stock?
Yes. A commission-based Medical Representative arrangement requires no initial investment. You promote our products to doctors in Vizianagaram and earn a commission on every prescription generated. This is a popular entry model for MRs who want to test the product range before upgrading to a full PCD franchise.

Start Your Pharma Franchise in Vizianagaram Today

Enquire about PCD franchise territories and commission-based MR opportunities in Crasenim Pharma's home city.
